models.code:
class Customer(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'customer'
    Id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    Name = Column(String(255))
    Balance = Column(Decimal, default=0.0)  # Derived attribute
    CreditLimit = Column(Decimal)
models.description: Customer model with derived attribute for balance and a credit limit.
models.name: Customer

models.code:
class Order(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'order'
    Id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    CustomerId = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('customer.Id'))
    AmountTotal = Column(Decimal, default=0.0)  # Derived attribute
    DateShipped = Column(DateTime, nullable=True)
    Notes = Column(String(8000))
models.description: Order model with derived attribute for amount total and a field for notes.
models.name: Order

models.code:
class Item(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'item'
    Id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    OrderId = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('order.Id'))
    ProductId = Column(Integer, ForeignKey('product.Id'))
    Quantity = Column(Integer)
    UnitPrice = Column(Decimal)  # Copied from Product
    Amount = Column(Decimal, default=0.0)  # Derived attribute
models.description: Item model with attributes for quantity, unit price (copied from product) and derived amount.
models.name: Item

models.code:
class Product(Base):
    __tablename__ = 'product'
    Id = Column(Integer, primary_key=True, autoincrement=True)
    Name = Column(String(255))
    UnitPrice = Column(Decimal)
models.name: Product

rules.name: CustomerBalanceLessThanCreditLimit
rules.description: Ensure a customer's balance does not exceed their credit limit.
rules.code: Rule.constraint(validate=Customer, as_condition=lambda row: row.Balance <= row.CreditLimit, error_msg='Customer balance ({row.Balance}) exceeds credit limit ({row.CreditLimit})')

rules.name: CustomerBalanceSumOfOrders
rules.description: Calculate customer's balance as the sum of their unshipped orders.
rules.code: Rule.sum(derive=Customer.Balance, as_sum_of=Order.AmountTotal, where=lambda row: row.DateShipped is None)

rules.name: OrderAmountTotalSumOfItems
rules.description: Calculate order's total amount as the sum of item amounts.

rules.name: ItemAmountCalculation
rules.description: Calculate item amount as product of quantity and unit price.

rules.name: CopyUnitPriceFromProduct
rules.description: Copy the unit price from the product to the item when added to an order.

rules.name: SendOrderToKafka
rules.description: Send Order to Kafka if DateShipped is not None.
rules.code: Rule.after_flush_row_event(on_class=Order, calling=kafka_producer.send_row_to_kafka, if_condition=lambda row: row.DateShipped is not None, with_args={'topic': 'order_shipping'})
